_meta.description: Platinum Rose NFL — Quality Gate Hooks
_meta.note: Self-enforced until Claude Code CLI is active. When CLI is active, these become executable pre-commit scripts.

pre-commit.description: Detect console.log statements left in changed files
pre-commit.failMessage: console.log detected in staged file(s). Remove before committing.

pre-commit.description: Run ESLint on staged JS/JSX files
pre-commit.command: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | grep -E '\.(js|jsx)$' | xargs npx eslint --max-warnings 0 2>/dev/null
pre-commit.failMessage: ESLint errors in staged files. Run: npx eslint src/ to see details.

pre-commit.description: Warn if App.jsx, storage.js, or picksDatabase.js are staged without a task brief
pre-commit.failMessage: Hot file staged. Confirm PM lock exists in AGENT_LOCK.json before committing.

pre-commit.description: Detect changes to canonical localStorage key strings
pre-commit.failMessage: localStorage key name change detected. Migration helper REQUIRED before committing.

pre-commit.description: Run test suite and fail if any tests fail
pre-commit.failMessage: Test suite failed. Fix failing tests before committing.

pre-commit.description: Verify production build succeeds after src/ changes
pre-commit.failMessage: Build failed. Fix errors before committing.

format-on-stop.description: Run ESLint --fix on changed files when dev session ends
format-on-stop.command: git diff --name-only | grep -E '\.(js|jsx)$' | xargs npx eslint --fix 2>/dev/null

selfEnforcementChecklist.description: Manual checklist to run before every commit until hooks are auto-executed
items: [ ] ESLint passes on changed files: npx eslint {files}
[ ] Hot files staged? → verify AGENT_LOCK.json has matching lock
[ ] localStorage key names unchanged (or migration helper committed)
[ ] git diff --stat → staged files match PM-delegated scope
